title: Implement Wave 36 manager assignment center decision rollup contract
description: Extend the manager priority queue API so provider-assignment items expose additive decision rollup metadata derived from assignment state, timeline, and evidence counts while preserving the current queue list contract.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/properties/priorities/queue returns additive decision_rollup metadata for provider-assignment items
Decision rollup exposes deterministic state badge, evidence count, latest decision label, and recommended next action
Queue consumers that ignore the additive node continue to work without contract breakage
